tweets.text: Problem worth solving: Human rights lawyers in countries with internet shutdowns lose access to case files stored in the cloud. There's no offline-first encrypted document tool that syncs when connectivity returns.

What if your case files lived on your device, encrypted with keys only you hold, and synced over whatever channel was available — internet, mesh, even USB? The building blocks exist. The glue doesn't.

github.com/FGUTech/libertas/issues/91
